benefits.description: Expected fat loss from titration protocol; user planning to assess results after 2 months

protocol_notes: User reports height 5'10", body fat ~22%. Prior 3-month 1,500 calorie/day cut resulted in ~30 lbs weight loss but user reported not perceiving visual changes. Consuming 170g protein daily during prior cut. Planning retatrutide titration: 0.5mg weekly, increasing 0.5mg every 2 weeks until reaching 2mg target dose. Considering 2-month cycle with potential continuation based on results. Will maintain consistent workout regimen concurrently.
